pcloud_code: <fill in the code= from the pCloud public link>
_comment: region: 'us' -> api.pcloud.com, 'eu' -> eapi.pcloud.com. After creating the public link, run scripts/fetch_data.py --make-manifest <bundle_dir> to populate sha256/size, then paste the file list below.

files.name: hetdocqa_embeddings.tar.zst
files.contents: bge-m3 embedding .npy blobs only (vectors; no source text). Convenience: skip re-embedding. Useless without the corpus, which rebuilds from sources via scripts/build_hetdocqa.py.
